pi_items.source: task description and setup_task.sh explicitly require removing and setting up 'junior_soc_analyst'
task description and setup_task.sh explicitly reference the user 'jsmith'
task description lists 'security_logs' and 'web_logs' as the allowed and default indexes
task description says 'Inherits from: the user role only'
task description explicitly forbids inheriting from 'admin' or 'power'
task description and environment scripts (setup_splunk.sh, setup_task.sh) use 'admin' as the default credential
task description and environment scripts use 'SplunkAdmin1!' for authentication

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic user ('jsmith' / 'Jordan Smith') and a custom role ('junior_soc_analyst') in the local Splunk environment using the admin credentials 'admin'/'SplunkAdmin1!'. The custom role is restricted to inheriting only from the 'user' role (explicitly forbidding 'admin' and 'power' inheritance) and is limited to searching only the 'security_logs' and 'web_logs' indexes (explicitly forbidding '*' and 'main').
